name: Kiwi PeonyHeart
description: This tool calculates the concentrations of certain pollutants released indoors while vaping. My app takes the inputs: amount of vape puffs, square footage of the room, time, and ventilation types, to return the concentrations of PM2.5, Benzene and toxic metals released into the room. The user should interpret the outputs as the estimate of concentrations of these pollutants based on an assumption of instantaneous mixing of the vape smoke with the air in the room.
